# workbench_controlled_gcs_bucket (Resource)

Workbench provisioned controlled GCS bucket resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "workbench_controlled_gcs_bucket" "my_gcs_bucket" {
  workspace_id = data.workbench_workspace.my_workspace.id
  name         = "my_tf_bucket"
  bucket_name  = "my-tf-bucket-vwb-project-id"
  description  = "this is a tf managed bucket"
}

output "workspace_gcs_bucket" {
  value = workbench_controlled_gcs_bucket.my_gcs_bucket
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String) Workbench workspace UUID

### Optional

- `bucket_name` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket cloud storage bucket name
- `clone_instruction` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket cloning instruction, e.g.
  COPY_RESOURCE, COPY_DEFINITION, COPY_LINK_REFERENCE, COPY_NOTHING, COPY_REFERENCE
- `description` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket description
- `display_name` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket display name
- `folder_id` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket folder ID
- `location` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket default resource location, e.g. us-central1,
  europe-west4
- `name` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket user facing display name
- `properties` (Attributes Set) Workbench properties in key-value pair (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--properties))
- `storage_class` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket default storage class, e.g. STANDARD,
  NEARLINE, COLDLINE, ARCHIVE

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket created date
- `id` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket unique identifier
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket last updated date
- `resource_lineage` (Attributes List) Workbench controlled GCS bucket resource lineage (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resource_lineage))
- `resource_type` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket resource type
- `stewardship_type` (String) Workbench controlled GCS bucket stewardship type

<a id="nestedatt--properties"></a>

### Nested Schema for `properties`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the property
- `value` (String) Value of the property

<a id="nestedatt--resource_lineage"></a>

### Nested Schema for `resource_lineage`

Required:

- `source_resource_id` (String) The ID of the source resource from which this controlled GCS bucket
  was cloned
- `source_workspace_id` (String) The ID of the workspace that contains the source resource from
  which this controlled GCS bucket was cloned

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the
[`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the
`id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = workbench_controlled_gcs_bucket.my_bucket
  id = "workspaces/{{workspace_uuid}}/controlled_gcs_buckets/{{bucket_uuid}}"
}
```
